title: Godot headless validation fails
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.
summary: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.

title: Android-targeted Godot repo is missing export surfaces or debug APK runnable proof
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-005a by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Emit export_presets.cfg and android/ surfaces at scaffold time. Block RELEASE-001 closeout until debug APK runnable proof exists at the canonical path.
summary: Emit export_presets.cfg and android/ surfaces at scaffold time. Block RELEASE-001 closeout until debug APK runnable proof exists at the canonical path.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Derived restart surfaces disagree with canonical workflow state, so resume guidance can route work from stale or contradictory facts
description: Remediate WFLOW010 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Regenerate `START-HERE.md`, `.opencode/state/context-snapshot.md`, and `.opencode/state/latest-handoff.md` from canonical manifest, workflow state, and pivot state after every workflow save, compute handoff readiness from bootstrap plus repair-follow-on plus verification state in one shared contract, and fail repair verification if any derived restart surface drifts.
summary: Regenerate `START-HERE.md`, `.opencode/state/context-snapshot.md`, and `.opencode/state/latest-handoff.md` from canonical manifest, workflow state, and pivot state after every workflow save, compute handoff readiness from bootstrap plus repair-follow-on plus verification state in one shared contract, and fail repair verification if any derived restart surface drifts.

title: Open-parent ticket decomposition is missing or routed through non-canonical source modes
description: Remediate WFLOW020 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Support `ticket_create(source_mode=split_scope)` for open-parent decomposition, keep the parent open and non-foreground, and keep open-parent child tickets out of `net_new_scope` and `post_completion_issue` routing.
summary: Support `ticket_create(source_mode=split_scope)` for open-parent decomposition, keep the parent open and non-foreground, and keep open-parent child tickets out of `net_new_scope` and `post_completion_issue` routing.

title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text or stale synthesized guidance instead of current project-specific procedure
description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
summary: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
